title: Ubiquiti InWall Junction Box for UAP-IW-HD, 25-pack
description: Plastic inwall juction box is suitable for installation of UniFi AP In Wall HD (UAP-IW-HD). The mounting box has several holes on the back side for attaching or inserting the Ethernet cable. The box also has 2 pillar for attach UAP unit The package contains 25 pieces of junction boxes
